title: Reusable Food Commercial Poster
sourceTitle: High Impact Commercial Food Double Juice Burger Commercial Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable food commercial poster with appetizing food hero image with styled plating, controlled surface details, and commercial lighting. high-impact commercial food hero poster. oversized appetizing hero product. ingredient energy shown visually instead of as tiny menu text. short headline and three selling-point badges. Product: juicy double cheeseburger with thick beef patties. Product Category: burger. Ingredients: beef patties, melted cheese, lettuce, onion rings, secret sauce, and brioche bun. Selling Points: three short badge claims: juicy bite, cheese pull, smoky sauce. Food Style: warm caramel commercial food photography with dramatic steam and sauce shine. Headline Text: DOUBLE JUICE BURGER. Palette: caramel brown, melted cheese yellow, tomato red, lettuce green, and warm toasted bun highlights. Subject: Make juicy double cheeseburger with thick beef patties the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in the scene, surface, props, and context implied by this source cue: 【 】, visual poster. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use one oversized food hero with dramatic ingredient motion and a clean poster frame. Keep side information as 3 large badges only, not a long menu. Style and Rendering: Render in warm caramel commercial food photography with dramatic steam and sauce shine. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use caramel brown, melted cheese yellow, tomato red, lettuce green, and warm toasted bun highlights. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
